distilledFrom: real Claude Code coding sessions via local Ollama (qwen2.5-coder:14b); durable memory in Backboard

skill/creative-franchise-expansion.name: Creative Franchise Expansion
skill/creative-franchise-expansion.learnedFromFinding: When expanding a creative franchise, it's crucial to maintain consistent continuity across all parts to avoid contradictions and ensure a cohesive narrative.

skill/automation-maintenance.name: Automation Maintenance
skill/automation-maintenance.learnedFromFinding: Automated hooks can become stale and require manual intervention to resolve, highlighting the need for engineers to regularly review and update automation scripts to prevent such issues.

skill/api-rate-limiting.name: API Rate Limiting
skill/api-rate-limiting.learnedFromFinding: When integrating third-party APIs, be prepared for unexpected rate limits that may not be directly related to your usage.

skill/angular-upgrade.name: Angular Upgrade
skill/angular-upgrade.learnedFromFinding: When upgrading Angular versions, ensure that local bridges and WebSocket servers are correctly configured to avoid connection issues.

skill/command-verification.name: Command Verification
skill/command-verification.learnedFromFinding: When working with local commands, always verify the actual current state by checking official documentation or authoritative sources instead of relying on inferred information.

skill/api-security.name: API Security
skill/api-security.learnedFromFinding: Always ensure valid authentication credentials are used when interacting with APIs to avoid repeated errors.

skill/memory-management.name: Memory Management
skill/memory-management.learnedFromFinding: When dealing with resource-constrained environments, ensure that critical processes like model loading have sufficient memory allocated to prevent silent failures due to out-of-memory errors.
useCases: Memory allocation for large model loads

skill/db-migration-safety.name: DB Migration Safety
skill/db-migration-safety.learnedFromFinding: Run schema migrations as expand→backfill→contract: never drop or rename a column in the same deploy that stops writing it, or in-flight code will read a column that no longer exists.

skill/docker-build-caching.name: Docker Build Caching
skill/docker-build-caching.learnedFromFinding: Order Dockerfile layers from least to most volatile and copy dependency manifests before source, so a code change doesn't bust the dependency-install cache layer.

skill/ci-flake-quarantine.name: CI Flake Quarantine
skill/ci-flake-quarantine.learnedFromFinding: When a test fails non-deterministically, quarantine it after N flaky runs instead of blanket-retrying the suite — blanket retries mask real regressions and inflate CI time.
useCases: Keeping signal in the test suite

skill/secret-rotation.name: Secret Rotation
skill/secret-rotation.learnedFromFinding: Rotate secrets with overlapping dual-validity windows — provision and activate the new secret before revoking the old one — so in-flight requests don't fail with 401 mid-rotation.

skill/websocket-reconnection.name: WebSocket Reconnection
skill/websocket-reconnection.learnedFromFinding: On a dropped WebSocket, reconnect with jittered exponential backoff and a resumable session token — never tight-loop reconnect, which stampedes the server on mass disconnects.
